title: 2026-01-17 Vision Labs Expedition and Squad Challenges
preview: Leadership reviewed the 2026 strategic 'beacon' to align squads around a small number of directional experiments, discussed headcount pacing and tight fiscal guardrails, walked through recent reliability incidents and mitigations, and opened the floor to squad-level challenges and lightning demos. Action items aroun...
text: Leadership reviewed the 2026 strategic 'beacon' to align squads around a small number of directional experiments, discussed headcount pacing and tight fiscal guardrails, walked through recent reliability incidents and mitigations, and opened the floor to squad-level challenges and lightning demos. Action items around experiment charters, hiring approvals, and a post-mortem schedule were agreed.

title: Summer product demo + AMA
preview: Company-wide summer all-hands focused on product demo for the new routing and caching features, readiness for the July pilot, a short ops update on Dedicated capacity, hiring priorities for Q3, and a 20-minute AMA. Leadership recapped metrics and next steps for teams to prepare launch artifacts and security docs.
